metadata.title: Flow Finance
metadata.description: Track your checking and savings accounts with ease.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your Google account to access your space.
auth.loginError: Could not sign in. Please try again.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Compare your income and spending month by month.
analytics.chartSubtitle: Grouped bars per month with net balance trend line.
analytics.empty: No transactions to analyze yet. Connect your bank to get started.
analytics.motherTransferSubtitle: Incoming transfers matching « VIREMENT EN VOTRE FAVEUR VIR INST de PASCAL SOPHIE ».
analytics.motherTransferActiveMonths: across {count, plural, one {# month} other {# months}} with a transfer
analytics.motherTransferNoneInPeriod: No matching transfers in this period.
analytics.motherTransferNoneFound: No matching transfers found in synced history.
analytics.subscriptionsEmptyHint: Add your subscriptions and recurring debits in settings.
analytics.subscriptionsCount: {count, plural, one {# active subscription} other {# active subscriptions}}
analytics.subscriptionsMonthTableHint: Click a month to see debits for that month.
analytics.subscriptionsMonthEmpty: No debits detected in this period.
analytics.subscriptionsTableHint: Monthly: paid this month or last month · Yearly: paid in the last 12 months (amount spread per month).
analytics.subscriptionsActiveEmpty: No active subscription for this period.

categoryAnalytics.title: Spending categories
categoryAnalytics.subtitle: Analyze how your spending breaks down and evolves by category, month after month.
categoryAnalytics.kpiTotalHint: over {count, plural, one {# month} other {# months}}
categoryAnalytics.chartSubtitle: Stacked monthly spending to track trends.
categoryAnalytics.chartClickHint: Click a month to update the breakdown on the right.
categoryAnalytics.empty: No spending to analyze yet. Connect your bank to get started.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions & recurring debits
subscriptions.description: Identify recurring spending (PayPal, SEPA debits, annual fees…).
subscriptions.paypalSectionDescription: PayPal debits detected by amount and billing day.
subscriptions.paypalPickClusterHint: ≥ 2 debits, or 1 last month. Use the icon to dismiss a false positive.
subscriptions.generalSectionDescription: Card payments and SEPA debits: same merchant across multiple months (dates in labels are ignored).
subscriptions.generalPickClusterHint: Detected when the same merchant appears in at least 2 distinct months with a debit last month or this month. Dismiss false positives with the crossed-eye icon.
subscriptions.pickClusterHint: ≥ 2 debits, or a single debit last month. Cancelled subs stay visible.
subscriptions.pickAmountHint: Each distinct amount usually maps to a different service.
subscriptions.noSuggestions: No unidentified recurring debits right now.
subscriptions.demoHint: Connect Supabase to save your subscriptions.
subscriptions.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
subscriptions.schemaError: Database schema is out of date. Run the Supabase migrations (recurring_payments, recurring_suggestion_dismissals).
subscriptions.inactiveError: This debit does not match any detected suggestion.
subscriptions.rematchWarning: Subscription saved, but linking transactions failed. Sync again.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.connectBankSoon: Set up Enable Banking environment variables to enable sync.
accounts.emptyDescription: Connect your bank to sync checking and savings accounts.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: Create your savings accounts and automatically track their balances from transfers to and from your checking account.
savings.accountCount: {count, plural, =0 {No accounts} one {# account} other {# accounts}}
savings.emptyDescription: Add your savings accounts (Livret A, LDD, LEP, Livret Jeune, PEL…), set their current balance and transfer labels: their balances will update automatically.
savings.deleteConfirmDescription: “{name}” will be permanently deleted. Associated transfers will reappear as expenses/income. This action cannot be undone.
savings.formDescription: Enter the current balance and the bank labels that identify transfers to and from this account.
savings.depositKeywordsPlaceholder: VIREMENT EMIS WEB M. PASCAL ALEXANDRE
savings.depositKeywordsHint: Comma-separated. A checking-account transaction containing one of these labels will count as a deposit into this account.
savings.withdrawalKeywordsPlaceholder: VIREMENT EN VOTRE FAVEUR DE M. PASCAL ALEXANDRE
savings.withdrawalKeywordsHint: Comma-separated. A transaction containing one of these labels will count as a withdrawal from this account to the checking account.
savings.schemaError: Run the savings accounts migration in Supabase.

categories.title: Expense categories
categories.description: Create categories and keywords to automatically classify spending based on bank descriptions.
categories.keywordsHint: Comma-separated. Matching descriptions are classified automatically. Manual corrections memorize a keyword from the description.
categories.deleteConfirmDescription: “{name}” will be permanently deleted and removed from the transactions it is assigned to (they will become uncategorized). This action cannot be undone.
categories.colorTakenHint: Color already used by another category.
categories.colorTakenError: This color is already used by another category.
categories.nameTakenError: A category already uses this name.
categories.schemaError: Run the categories migration in Supabase.
